42: class ProviderError extends Error {
43:   constructor(
44:     public readonly code:
45:       | 'provider_auth_failed'
46:       | 'provider_rate_limited'
47:       | 'provider_project_not_found'
48:       | 'provider_deploy_failed'

66: function parseBoolean(value: string | undefined, fallback: boolean): boolean {
67:   if (value === undefined) {
68:     return fallback;
69:   }
70:   const normalized = value.trim().toLowerCase();
71:   if (normalized === 'true' || normalized === '1' || normalized === 'yes' || normalized === 'on') {
72:     return true;
73:   }
74:   if (normalized === 'false' || normalized === '0' || normalized === 'no' || normalized === 'off') {
75:     return false;
76:   }
77:   return fallback;
78: }

80: function requireEnv(value: string | undefined, key: string): string {
81:   if (typeof value !== 'string' || value.trim() === '') {
82:     throw new ProviderError('provider_auth_failed', `Missing required provider env: ${key}`);
83:   }
84:   return value.trim();
85: }

87: function isValidRelativeOutputDir(value: string): boolean {
88:   if (!value || value === '.') {
89:     return false;
90:   }
91:   if (value.startsWith('/') || value.includes('..') || value.includes('\\')) {
92:     return false;
93:   }
94:   return value.split('/').every((segment) => Boolean(segment) && segment !== '.');
95: }

97: function mapProviderState(input: string): WorkspaceDeploymentStatus {
98:   const normalized = input.trim().toLowerCase();
99:   if (normalized === 'queued' || normalized === 'pending') {
100:     return 'queued';
101:   }
102:   if (normalized === 'running' || normalized === 'in_progress' || normalized === 'processing') {
103:     return 'running';

141: class CloudflareWorkersAssetsProvider implements WorkspaceDeployProvider {
142:   readonly name = 'cloudflare_workers_assets' as const;
143:   private readonly accountId: string;
144:   private readonly apiToken: string;
145:   private readonly previewDomain: string;
146:   private readonly projectName: string;
147: 
148:   constructor(private readonly env: Env) {
149:     this.accountId = requireEnv(env.CF_ACCOUNT_ID, 'CF_ACCOUNT_ID');
150:     this.apiToken = requireEnv(env.CF_API_TOKEN, 'CF_API_TOKEN');
151:     this.previewDomain = requireEnv(env.WORKSPACE_DEPLOY_PREVIEW_DOMAIN, 'WORKSPACE_DEPLOY_PREVIEW_DOMAIN');
152:     this.projectName = requireEnv(env.WORKSPACE_DEPLOY_PROJECT_NAME, 'WORKSPACE_DEPLOY_PROJECT_NAME');
153: 
154:     if (!parseBoolean(env.WORKSPACE_DEPLOY_REAL_PROVIDER_ENABLED, false)) {
155:       throw new ProviderError(
156:         'provider_scope_missing',
157:         'Real deploy provider is disabled; set WORKSPACE_DEPLOY_REAL_PROVIDER_ENABLED=true to enable'
158:       );
159:     }
160:   }
161: 
162:   private request(path: string, init?: RequestInit): Promise<Response> {
163:     return providerFetch(`https://api.cloudflare.com/client/v4${path}`, {
164:       ...init,
165:       headers: {
166:         Authorization: `Bearer ${this.apiToken}`,
167:         'Content-Type': 'application/json',
168:         ...(init?.headers ?? {}),
169:       },
170:     });
171:   }
172: 
173:   private async parseCloudflareResult(response: Response): Promise<Record<string, unknown>> {
174:     const text = await response.text();
175:     let parsed: Record<string, unknown> = {};
176:     try {
177:       parsed = JSON.parse(text) as Record<string, unknown>;
178:     } catch {
179:       parsed = {};
180:     }
181: 
182:     if (response.status === 401) {
183:       throw new ProviderError('provider_auth_failed', 'Cloudflare API token is invalid');
184:     }
185:     if (response.status === 403) {
186:       throw new ProviderError('provider_scope_missing', 'Cloudflare API token is missing required scopes');
187:     }
188:     if (response.status === 404) {
189:       throw new ProviderError('provider_project_not_found', `Cloudflare project ${this.projectName} was not found`);
190:     }
191:     if (response.status === 429) {
192:       throw new ProviderError('provider_rate_limited', 'Cloudflare API rate limit exceeded');
193:     }
194:     if (!response.ok) {
195:       const errorMessage =
196:         typeof parsed.errors === 'object' && parsed.errors !== null
197:           ? JSON.stringify(parsed.errors)
198:           : text || `Cloudflare API request failed with status ${response.status}`;
199:       throw new ProviderError('provider_deploy_failed', errorMessage);
200:     }
201: 
202:     return parsed;
203:   }
204: 
205:   private previewUrlForDeployment(deploymentId: string): string {
206:     return `https://dep-${deploymentId}.${this.previewDomain}`;
207:   }
208: 
209:   async precheck(): Promise<WorkspaceDeployProviderPrecheck[]> {
210:     const checks: WorkspaceDeployProviderPrecheck[] = [];
211:     checks.push({ code: 'provider_real_enabled', ok: true });
212:     checks.push({ code: 'provider_credentials_present', ok: true });
213: 
214:     const response = await this.request(`/accounts/${this.accountId}/workers/scripts/${this.projectName}`);
215:     await this.parseCloudflareResult(response);
216:     checks.push({ code: 'provider_project_access', ok: true });
217:     return checks;
218:   }
219: 
220:   async createDeployment(input: WorkspaceDeployCreateInput): Promise<WorkspaceDeployCreateResult> {
221:     if (!isValidRelativeOutputDir(input.outputDir)) {
222:       throw new ProviderError(
223:         'provider_invalid_output_dir',
224:         'deploy.outputDir must be a safe non-root relative directory path'
225:       );
226:     }
227: 
228:     const response = await this.request(`/accounts/${this.accountId}/workers/scripts/${this.projectName}/deployments`, {
229:       method: 'POST',
230:       body: JSON.stringify({
231:         deployment_id: input.deploymentId,
232:         alias: `dep-${input.deploymentId}`,
233:         output_dir: input.outputDir,
234:         artifact_sha256: input.outputBundle.sha256,
235:         artifact_bytes: input.outputBundle.bytes.byteLength,
236:         preview_url: this.previewUrlForDeployment(input.deploymentId),
237:       }),
238:     });
239:     const parsed = await this.parseCloudflareResult(response);
240:     const result =
241:       typeof parsed.result === 'object' && parsed.result !== null ? (parsed.result as Record<string, unknown>) : {};
242:     const providerDeploymentId =
243:       typeof result.id === 'string' && result.id.trim() ? result.id.trim() : `cfdep_${input.deploymentId}`;
244: 
245:     return {
246:       providerDeploymentId,
247:       status: 'running',
248:       deployedUrl: this.previewUrlForDeployment(input.deploymentId),
249:     };
250:   }
251: 
252:   async getDeploymentStatus(providerDeploymentId: string): Promise<WorkspaceDeployStatusResult> {
253:     const response = await this.request(
254:       `/accounts/${this.accountId}/workers/scripts/${this.projectName}/deployments/${providerDeploymentId}`
255:     );
256:     const parsed = await this.parseCloudflareResult(response);
257:     const result =
258:       typeof parsed.result === 'object' && parsed.result !== null ? (parsed.result as Record<string, unknown>) : {};
259:     const state = typeof result.status === 'string' ? mapProviderState(result.status) : 'running';
260:     return {
261:       status: state,
262:       deployedUrl:
263:         typeof result.preview_url === 'string' && result.preview_url.trim()
264:           ? result.preview_url
265:           : this.previewUrlForDeployment(providerDeploymentId.replace(/^cfdep_/, '')),
266:       errorCode: typeof result.error_code === 'string' ? result.error_code : undefined,
267:       errorMessage: typeof result.error_message === 'string' ? result.error_message : undefined,
268:     };
269:   }
270: 
271:   async cancelDeployment(providerDeploymentId: string): Promise<{ accepted: boolean }> {
272:     const response = await this.request(
273:       `/accounts/${this.accountId}/workers/scripts/${this.projectName}/deployments/${providerDeploymentId}/cancel`,
274:       { method: 'POST', body: '{}' }
275:     );
276: 
277:     if (response.status === 404 || response.status === 409) {
278:       return { accepted: false };
279:     }
280: 
281:     await this.parseCloudflareResult(response);
282:     return { accepted: true };
283:   }
284: }
285: 
286: export function getWorkspaceDeployProviderName(input: unknown, env: Env): WorkspaceDeployProviderName {
287:   if (typeof input === 'string' && input.trim()) {
288:     if (input === 'simulated' || input === 'cloudflare_workers_assets') {
289:       return input;
290:     }
291:   }
292: 
293:   if (env.WORKSPACE_DEPLOY_PROVIDER === 'cloudflare_workers_assets') {
294:     return 'cloudflare_workers_assets';
295:   }
296: 
297:   return 'simulated';
298: }
299: 
300: export function createWorkspaceDeployProvider(providerName: WorkspaceDeployProviderName, env: Env): WorkspaceDeployProvider {
301:   if (providerName === 'cloudflare_workers_assets') {
302:     return new CloudflareWorkersAssetsProvider(env);
303:   }
304:   return new SimulatedWorkspaceDeployProvider(env);
305: }
306: 
307: export function normalizeProviderError(error: unknown): { code: string; message: string } {
308:   if (error instanceof ProviderError) {
309:     return { code: error.code, message: error.message };
310:   }
311: 
312:   if (error instanceof Error) {
313:     return { code: 'provider_deploy_failed', message: error.message };
314:   }
315: 
316:   return { code: 'provider_deploy_failed', message: String(error) };
317: }

635:   }
636: 
637:   const startedAtEpochMs = Date.parse(startedAt);
638:   if (!Number.isFinite(startedAtEpochMs)) {
639:     return false;
640:   }
641: 
642:   return Date.now() - startedAtEpochMs >= STALE_RUNNING_TIMEOUT_MS;
643: }

652: async function executeWorkspaceDeployment(env: Env, workspaceId: string, deploymentId: string): Promise<void> {
653:   const deployment = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
654:   if (!deployment) {
655:     return;
656:   }
657:   const payload = await getWorkspaceDeploymentRequestPayload(env.DB, deploymentId);
658:   if (!payload) {
659:     throw new PolicyError('deployment_not_found', 'Deployment payload no longer exists');
660:   }
661: 
662:   const workspace = await getWorkspace(env.DB, workspaceId);
663:   if (!workspace || workspace.status !== 'ready') {
664:     throw new PolicyError('workspace_not_ready', 'Workspace is not ready for deployment');
665:   }
666: 
667:   const validation =
668:     payload.validation && typeof payload.validation === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.validation)
669:       ? (payload.validation as Record<string, unknown>)
670:       : {};
671:   const autoFix =
672:     payload.autoFix && typeof payload.autoFix === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.autoFix)
673:       ? (payload.autoFix as Record<string, unknown>)
674:       : {};
675:   const cache =
676:     payload.cache && typeof payload.cache === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.cache)
677:       ? (payload.cache as Record<string, unknown>)
678:       : {};
679:   const requestedToolchain =
680:     payload.toolchain && typeof payload.toolchain === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.toolchain)
681:       ? (payload.toolchain as Record<string, unknown>)
682:       : null;
683:   const deploy =
684:     payload.deploy && typeof payload.deploy === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.deploy)
685:       ? (payload.deploy as Record<string, unknown>)
686:       : {};
687:   const validationOptions: DeploymentValidationOptions = {
688:     runBuildIfPresent: parseBoolean(validation.runBuildIfPresent, true),
689:     runTestsIfPresent: parseBoolean(validation.runTestsIfPresent, true),
690:   };
691:   const autoFixOptions: DeploymentAutoFixOptions = {
692:     rehydrateBaseline: parseBoolean(autoFix.rehydrateBaseline, false),
693:     bootstrapToolchain: parseBoolean(autoFix.bootstrapToolchain, false),
694:   };
695:   const cacheOptions: DeploymentCacheOptions = {
696:     dependencyCache: parseBoolean(cache.dependencyCache, true),
697:   };
698:   const publishOptions: DeploymentPublishOptions = {
699:     provider: getWorkspaceDeployProviderName(payload.provider, env),
700:     outputDir: parseString(deploy.outputDir),
701:   };
702:   const { runBuildIfPresent, runTestsIfPresent } = validationOptions;
703:   const rollbackOnFailure = parseBoolean(payload.rollbackOnFailure, true);
704:   const remediations: WorkspaceDeploymentRemediation[] = [];
705:   const workspaceProjectRootRaw =
706:     typeof workspace.sourceProjectRoot === 'string' && workspace.sourceProjectRoot.trim() ? workspace.sourceProjectRoot : '.';
707:   let workspaceProjectRoot = '.';
708:   try {
709:     workspaceProjectRoot = normalizeProjectRoot(workspaceProjectRootRaw);
710:   } catch (error) {
711:     throw new PolicyError('invalid_project_root', error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error));
712:   }
713: 
714:   if (publishOptions.provider === 'cloudflare_workers_assets' && !publishOptions.outputDir) {
715:     throw new PolicyError(
716:       'provider_invalid_output_dir',
717:       'deploy.outputDir is required for cloudflare_workers_assets provider'
718:     );
719:   }
720: 
721:   const sandbox = await sandboxResolver(env, workspace.sandboxId);
722:   try {
723:     await ensureWorkspaceGitBaseline(sandbox);
724:   } catch (error) {
725:     if (!(error instanceof PolicyError) || error.code !== 'baseline_missing') {
726:       throw error;
727:     }
728: 
729:     if (!autoFixOptions.rehydrateBaseline) {
730:       throw error;
731:     }
732: 
733:     await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
734:       workspaceId,
735:       deploymentId,
736:       eventType: 'deployment_baseline_rehydrate_attempted',
737:       payload: {},
738:     });
739: 
740:     const rehydrated = await tryRehydrateWorkspaceGitBaseline(sandbox);
741:     if (!rehydrated) {
742:       await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
743:         workspaceId,
744:         deploymentId,
745:         eventType: 'deployment_baseline_rehydrate_failed',
746:         payload: {},
747:       });
748:       throw new PolicyError('baseline_rehydrate_failed', 'Workspace git baseline is missing and could not be rehydrated');
749:     }
750: 
751:     remediations.push({ code: 'baseline_rehydrated', applied: true });
752:     await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
753:       workspaceId,
754:       deploymentId,
755:       eventType: 'deployment_baseline_rehydrate_succeeded',
756:       payload: {},
757:     });
758:   }
759: 
760:   const provenance =
761:     payload.provenance && typeof payload.provenance === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.provenance)
762:       ? (payload.provenance as Record<string, unknown>)
763:       : {};
764:   const taskId = typeof provenance.taskId === 'string' ? provenance.taskId : null;
765:   const operationId = typeof provenance.operationId === 'string' ? provenance.operationId : null;
766:   if (taskId) {
767:     const task = await getWorkspaceTask(env.DB, workspaceId, taskId);
768:     if (!task) {
769:       throw new PolicyError('invalid_provenance_task', 'Referenced taskId does not belong to workspace');
770:     }
771:   }
772:   if (operationId) {
773:     const operation = await getWorkspaceOperation(env.DB, workspaceId, operationId);
774:     if (!operation) {
775:       throw new PolicyError('invalid_provenance_operation', 'Referenced operationId does not belong to workspace');
776:     }
777:   }
778: 
779:   await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
780:     workspaceId,
781:     deploymentId,
782:     eventType: 'deployment_started',
783:     payload: {
784:       provider: deployment.provider,
785:       attemptCount: deployment.attemptCount,
786:       runBuildIfPresent,
787:       runTestsIfPresent,
788:       autoFix: autoFixOptions,
789:       cache: cacheOptions,
790:     },
791:   });
792: 
793:   await throwIfDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId);
794: 
795:   let provider;
796:   try {
797:     provider = createWorkspaceDeployProvider(publishOptions.provider, env);
798:     const providerChecks = await provider.precheck();
799:     await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
800:       workspaceId,
801:       deploymentId,
802:       eventType: 'deployment_provider_precheck',
803:       payload: {
804:         provider: publishOptions.provider,
805:         checks: providerChecks,
806:       },
807:     });
808:     const failedCheck = providerChecks.find((check) => !check.ok);
809:     if (failedCheck) {
810:       throw new PolicyError(failedCheck.code, failedCheck.details ?? 'Provider precheck failed');
811:     }
812:   } catch (error) {
813:     const providerError = normalizeProviderError(error);
814:     throw new PolicyError(providerError.code, providerError.message);
815:   }
816: 
817:   let toolchain: WorkspaceToolchainProfile;
818:   try {
819:     toolchain = applyRequestedToolchainOverride(
820:       await detectWorkspaceToolchainProfile(
821:         sandbox,
822:         workspaceProjectRoot
823:       ),
824:       requestedToolchain
825:     );
826:   } catch (error) {
827:     throw new PolicyError('toolchain_detect_failed', error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error));
828:   }
829: 
830:   await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
831:     workspaceId,
832:     deploymentId,
833:     eventType: 'deployment_toolchain_detected',
834:     payload: toolchain,
835:   });
836: 
837:   if (toolchain.manager === 'unknown') {
838:     await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
839:       workspaceId,
840:       deploymentId,
841:       eventType: 'deployment_toolchain_unknown_fallback',
842:       payload: { fallbackManager: 'npm' },
843:     });
844:   }
845: 
846:   await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'running', {
847:     workspaceId,
848:     toolchain,
849:     remediations,
850:   });
851: 
852:   const scripts = await detectPackageScriptsInProjectRoot(sandbox, workspaceProjectRoot);
853:   const shouldBootstrapForValidation =
854:     (runTestsIfPresent && scripts.hasTest) || (runBuildIfPresent && scripts.hasBuild);
855: 
856:   if (autoFixOptions.bootstrapToolchain && shouldBootstrapForValidation) {
857:     await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
858:       workspaceId,
859:       deploymentId,
860:       eventType: 'deployment_toolchain_bootstrap_started',
861:       payload: {
862:         manager: toolchain.manager,
863:         version: toolchain.version,
864:       },
865:     });
866:     try {
867:       await bootstrapToolchainIfNeeded(sandbox, toolchain);
868:       if (toolchain.manager === 'pnpm' || toolchain.manager === 'yarn') {
869:         remediations.push({ code: 'toolchain_bootstrapped', applied: true });
870:       }
871:       await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
872:         workspaceId,
873:         deploymentId,
874:         eventType: 'deployment_toolchain_bootstrap_succeeded',
875:         payload: { manager: toolchain.manager },
876:       });
877:     } catch (error) {
878:       await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
879:         workspaceId,
880:         deploymentId,
881:         eventType: 'deployment_toolchain_bootstrap_failed',
882:         payload: {
883:           manager: toolchain.manager,
884:           message: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
885:         },
886:       });
887:       throw error;
888:     }
889:   } else {
890:     await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
891:       workspaceId,
892:       deploymentId,
893:       eventType: 'deployment_toolchain_bootstrap_succeeded',
894:       payload: { manager: toolchain.manager, skipped: true },
895:     });
896:   }
897:   await throwIfDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId);
898: 
899:   const potentialSecrets = await detectPotentialSecrets(sandbox);
900:   if (potentialSecrets.length > 0) {
901:     throw new PolicyError(
902:       'potential_secrets_detected',
903:       `Potential secrets detected in workspace files: ${potentialSecrets.join(', ')}`
904:     );
905:   }
906: 
907:   const dependencyCacheKey = cacheOptions.dependencyCache ? await makeDependencyCacheKey(workspaceId, toolchain) : null;
908:   await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'running', {
909:     workspaceId,
910:     toolchain,
911:     dependencyCacheKey,
912:     dependencyCacheHit: false,
913:     remediations,
914:   });
915: 
916:   if (cacheOptions.dependencyCache && dependencyCacheKey) {
917:     const existingCache = await getWorkspaceDependencyCache(env.DB, workspaceId, dependencyCacheKey);
918:     if (!existingCache) {
919:       await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
920:         workspaceId,
921:         deploymentId,
922:         eventType: 'deployment_dependency_cache_miss',
923:         payload: { dependencyCacheKey },
924:       });
925:     } else {
926:       await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
927:         workspaceId,
928:         deploymentId,
929:         eventType: 'deployment_dependency_cache_hit',
930:         payload: { dependencyCacheKey, artifactKey: existingCache.artifactKey },
931:       });
932:       try {
933:         const bucket = env.WORKSPACE_ARTIFACTS ?? env.SOURCE_BUNDLES;
934:         const object = bucket ? await bucket.get(existingCache.artifactKey) : null;
935:         if (!object) {
936:           throw new Error('Dependency cache artifact is unavailable');
937:         }
938:         const bytes = new Uint8Array(await object.arrayBuffer());
939:         const artifactSha256 = await sha256Hex(bytes);
940:         if (artifactSha256 !== existingCache.artifactSha256) {
941:           throw new Error('Dependency cache integrity check failed: sha256 mismatch');
942:         }
943:         await restoreDependencyCacheArchive(sandbox, toolchain, bytes);
944:         await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'running', {
945:           workspaceId,
946:           dependencyCacheHit: true,
947:         });
948:       } catch (error) {
949:         await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
950:           workspaceId,
951:           deploymentId,
952:           eventType: 'deployment_dependency_cache_restore_failed',
953:           payload: {
954:             dependencyCacheKey,
955:             message: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
956:           },
957:         });
958:       }
959:     }
960:   }
961: 
962:   if (runTestsIfPresent && scripts.hasTest) {
963:     await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
964:       workspaceId,
965:       deploymentId,
966:       eventType: 'validation_started',
967:       payload: { step: 'test' },
968:     });
969:     try {
970:       await runValidationStep(
971:         sandbox,
972:         `cd ${shellQuote(workspaceProjectRoot === '.' ? WORKSPACE_ROOT : `${WORKSPACE_ROOT}/${workspaceProjectRoot}`)} && ${managerRunScriptCommand(toolchain, 'test')}`,
973:         10 * 60 * 1000,
974:         'validation_tool_missing'
975:       );
976:     } catch (error) {
977:       if (error instanceof PolicyError && error.code === 'validation_tool_missing') {
978:         await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
979:           workspaceId,
980:           deploymentId,
981:           eventType: 'deployment_validation_tool_missing',
982:           payload: { step: 'test', message: error.message },
983:         });
984:       }
985:       throw error;
986:     }
987:     await throwIfDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId);
988:   }
989:   if (runBuildIfPresent && scripts.hasBuild) {
990:     await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
991:       workspaceId,
992:       deploymentId,
993:       eventType: 'validation_started',
994:       payload: { step: 'build' },
995:     });
996:     try {
997:       await runValidationStep(
998:         sandbox,
999:         `cd ${shellQuote(workspaceProjectRoot === '.' ? WORKSPACE_ROOT : `${WORKSPACE_ROOT}/${workspaceProjectRoot}`)} && ${managerRunScriptCommand(toolchain, 'build')}`,
1000:         10 * 60 * 1000,
1001:         'validation_tool_missing'
1002:       );
1003:     } catch (error) {
1004:       if (error instanceof PolicyError && error.code === 'validation_tool_missing') {
1005:         await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1006:           workspaceId,
1007:           deploymentId,
1008:           eventType: 'deployment_validation_tool_missing',
1009:           payload: { step: 'build', message: error.message },
1010:         });
1011:       }
1012:       throw error;
1013:     }
1014:     await throwIfDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1015:   }
1016: 
1017:   if (cacheOptions.dependencyCache && dependencyCacheKey) {
1018:     const archive = await createDependencyCacheArchive(sandbox, toolchain);
1019:     if (archive) {
1020:       const bucket = env.WORKSPACE_ARTIFACTS ?? env.SOURCE_BUNDLES;
1021:       if (bucket) {
1022:         const artifactKey = `workspaces/${workspaceId}/dependency-caches/${dependencyCacheKey}.tar.gz`;
1023:         await bucket.put(artifactKey, archive.bytes, {
1024:           httpMetadata: { contentType: 'application/gzip' },
1025:           customMetadata: {
1026:             workspace_id: workspaceId,
1027:             cache_key: dependencyCacheKey,
1028:             manager: toolchain.manager,
1029:           },
1030:         });
1031:         await upsertWorkspaceDependencyCache(env.DB, {
1032:           id: `wdc_${dependencyCacheKey.slice(0, 24)}`,
1033:           workspaceId,
1034:           cacheKey: dependencyCacheKey,
1035:           manager: toolchain.manager,
1036:           managerVersion: toolchain.version,
1037:           projectRoot: toolchain.projectRoot,
1038:           lockfileName: toolchain.lockfile?.name ?? null,
1039:           lockfileSha256: toolchain.lockfile?.sha256 ?? null,
1040:           artifactKey,
1041:           artifactSha256: archive.sha256,
1042:           artifactBytes: archive.bytes.byteLength,
1043:         });
1044:         await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1045:           workspaceId,
1046:           deploymentId,
1047:           eventType: 'deployment_dependency_cache_saved',
1048:           payload: {
1049:             dependencyCacheKey,
1050:             artifactKey,
1051:             artifactBytes: archive.bytes.byteLength,
1052:           },
1053:         });
1054:       }
1055:     }
1056:   }
1057: 
1058:   const sourceBundle = await createDeploymentBundle(sandbox);
1059:   await throwIfDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1060:   const bucket = env.WORKSPACE_ARTIFACTS ?? env.SOURCE_BUNDLES;
1061:   if (!bucket) {
1062:     throw new Error('No artifact bucket is configured for workspace deployment');
1063:   }
1064: 
1065:   const sourceBundleKey = `workspaces/${workspaceId}/deployments/${deploymentId}/${sourceBundle.objectKeySuffix}`;
1066:   await bucket.put(sourceBundleKey, sourceBundle.bytes, {
1067:     httpMetadata: {
1068:       contentType: 'application/gzip',
1069:     },
1070:     customMetadata: {
1071:       workspace_id: workspaceId,
1072:       deployment_id: deploymentId,
1073:       source_snapshot_sha256: sourceBundle.sha256,
1074:     },
1075:   });
1076:   await throwIfDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1077: 
1078:   let outputBundle = sourceBundle;
1079:   let publishOutputDir = workspaceProjectRoot;
1080:   if (publishOptions.provider === 'cloudflare_workers_assets') {
1081:     const relativeOutputDir = publishOptions.outputDir;
1082:     if (!relativeOutputDir) {
1083:       throw new PolicyError('provider_invalid_output_dir', 'deploy.outputDir is required for cloudflare_workers_assets provider');
1084:     }
1085:     publishOutputDir =
1086:       workspaceProjectRoot === '.'
1087:         ? normalizeProjectRoot(relativeOutputDir)
1088:         : normalizeProjectRoot(`${workspaceProjectRoot}/${relativeOutputDir}`);
1089:     outputBundle = await createOutputBundle(sandbox, publishOutputDir);
1090:   }
1091: 
1092:   const createResult = await provider.createDeployment({
1093:     workspaceId,
1094:     deploymentId,
1095:     outputDir: publishOutputDir,
1096:     outputBundle: {
1097:       bytes: outputBundle.bytes,
1098:       sha256: outputBundle.sha256,
1099:     },
1100:   });
1101:   await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1102:     workspaceId,
1103:     deploymentId,
1104:     eventType: 'deployment_provider_created',
1105:     payload: {
1106:       provider: publishOptions.provider,
1107:       providerDeploymentId: createResult.providerDeploymentId,
1108:       status: createResult.status,
1109:       deployedUrl: createResult.deployedUrl,
1110:       outputDir: publishOutputDir,
1111:     },
1112:   });
1113: 
1114:   let providerStatus: WorkspaceDeployStatusResult = {
1115:     status: createResult.status,
1116:     deployedUrl: createResult.deployedUrl,
1117:   };
1118:   let cancelAttempted = false;
1119:   const maxPollAttempts = 120;
1120:   for (let attempt = 0; attempt < maxPollAttempts; attempt += 1) {
1121:     await throwIfDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId).catch(async (error) => {
1122:       if (error instanceof CancelRequestedError && !cancelAttempted) {
1123:         cancelAttempted = true;
1124:         const cancel = await provider.cancelDeployment(createResult.providerDeploymentId);
1125:         await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1126:           workspaceId,
1127:           deploymentId,
1128:           eventType: 'deployment_provider_cancel_requested',
1129:           payload: {
1130:             providerDeploymentId: createResult.providerDeploymentId,
1131:             accepted: cancel.accepted,
1132:           },
1133:         });
1134:         if (cancel.accepted) {
1135:           throw new CancelRequestedError();
1136:         }
1137:         return;
1138:       }
1139:       throw error;
1140:     });
1141: 
1142:     if (providerStatus.status === 'succeeded' || providerStatus.status === 'failed' || providerStatus.status === 'cancelled') {
1143:       break;
1144:     }
1145: 
1146:     await new Promise((resolve) => setTimeout(resolve, 1500));
1147:     providerStatus = await provider.getDeploymentStatus(createResult.providerDeploymentId);
1148:     await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1149:       workspaceId,
1150:       deploymentId,
1151:       eventType: 'deployment_provider_status',
1152:       payload: {
1153:         providerDeploymentId: createResult.providerDeploymentId,
1154:         status: providerStatus.status,
1155:         deployedUrl: providerStatus.deployedUrl,
1156:       },
1157:     });
1158:   }
1159: 
1160:   if (providerStatus.status === 'failed') {
1161:     throw new PolicyError(providerStatus.errorCode ?? 'provider_deploy_failed', providerStatus.errorMessage ?? 'Provider deployment failed');
1162:   }
1163: 
1164:   if (providerStatus.status === 'cancelled') {
1165:     await markDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId, 'provider_cancelled');
1166:     return;
1167:   }
1168: 
1169:   const deployedUrl = providerStatus.deployedUrl ?? createResult.deployedUrl;
1170:   if (!deployedUrl) {
1171:     throw new PolicyError('provider_deploy_failed', 'Provider deployment did not return a deployed URL');
1172:   }
1173: 
1174:   const finishedAt = new Date().toISOString();
1175:   const successResult = {
1176:     url: deployedUrl,
1177:     artifact: {
1178:       sourceBundleKey,
1179:       sourceSnapshotSha256: sourceBundle.sha256,
1180:       outputBundleSha256: outputBundle.sha256,
1181:       outputDir: publishOutputDir,
1182:     },
1183:     provenance: {
1184:       workspaceId,
1185:       taskId,
1186:       operationId,
1187:       trigger: typeof provenance.trigger === 'string' ? provenance.trigger : 'manual',
1188:     },
1189:     rollbackOnFailure,
1190:   };
1191: 
1192:   const markedSucceeded = await markWorkspaceDeploymentSucceededIfNotCancelled(env.DB, {
1193:     workspaceId,
1194:     deploymentId,
1195:     sourceSnapshotSha256: sourceBundle.sha256,
1196:     sourceBundleKey,
1197:     deployedUrl,
1198:     providerDeploymentId: createResult.providerDeploymentId,
1199:     result: successResult,
1200:     finishedAt,
1201:   });
1202: 
1203:   if (!markedSucceeded) {
1204:     const latest = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1205:     if (latest?.cancelRequestedAt) {
1206:       await markDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId, 'cancel_requested');
1207:     }
1208:     return;
1209:   }
1210: 
1211:   await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1212:     workspaceId,
1213:     deploymentId,
1214:     eventType: 'deployment_succeeded',
1215:       payload: {
1216:         deployedUrl,
1217:         sourceBundleKey,
1218:         sourceSnapshotSha256: sourceBundle.sha256,
1219:       },
1220:     });
1221: 
1222:   await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
1223:     deploymentId,
1224:     status: 'succeeded',
1225:     deployedUrl,
1226:     deployedAt: finishedAt,
1227:     errorCode: null,
1228:     errorMessage: null,
1229:   });
1230: }

1232: export async function runWorkspaceDeploymentPreflight(
1233:   env: Env,
1234:   workspaceId: string,
1235:   options?: Partial<DeploymentValidationOptions & DeploymentAutoFixOptions & DeploymentPublishOptions>
1236: ): Promise<{
1237:   ok: boolean;
1238:   toolchain: WorkspaceToolchainProfile | null;
1239:   checks: Array<{ code: string; ok: boolean; details?: string }>;
